description: Style Note Let only transform your everyday life from grey and monotonous to fun, colourful and creatively eventful! We're super excited in the myntra office to be selling these yummy tops and dresses from the quirky, flirty, denim brand ONLY. It's easy to look both cute and on-trend when you're wearing anything from this summery collection. Product Details Bright green vest top made of knit rib with scoop neck and ruching detail at centre front Material and Care 95% cotton 5% elastane Machine wash cold at 40 degrees with like colors Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Use cold iron Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
